name: feature.insights-suite.agents
description: Insights & Drafting Agent Suite agent pack (ADR 0078 / RFC 0070) — three role-scoped manifest agents driven through the existing chat: Financial (Actual-vs-Plan variance analysis), Communication (in-voice recognition drafting, never auto-send), Talent (9-box readiness). Each is tool-allowlisted to the suite's nodes + the ADR 0076 read-only connectors + KB retrieval; none can write or send.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Financial Analyst
agents.description: Reads store financials read-only (BigQuery), computes Actual-vs-Plan variance for sales/margin/labor/shrink, and surfaces off-plan hot spots with the exact SQL for 'Verify Source'. Never writes; flags figures for human review.

agents.label: Communication Drafter
agents.description: Drafts authentic, in-voice recognition messages (work anniversaries, milestones) by retrieving the principal's past messages as style exemplars. ALWAYS a draft for approval — never sends. Humble, gratitude-led tone; bans corporate buzzwords.

agents.label: Talent Advisor
agents.description: Reads talent/development data read-only, computes 9-box performance×potential readiness, and prepares talent-review insight for direct reports and two levels down. Read-only HRIS; never writes.
